nasb.text: When the messenger came and told him, saying, “They have brought the heads of the king’s sons,” he said, “Put them in two heaps at the entrance of the gate until morning.”

esv.text: When the messenger came and told him, “They have brought the heads of the king’s sons,” he said, “Lay them in two heaps at the entrance of the gate until the morning.”

cnv.text: 有使者來告訴耶戶說：“王的眾子的頭送到了。”他說：“把它們分作兩堆放在城門口，直到早上。”

ccb.text: 使者告诉耶户：“他们将王众子孙的首级送来了。”耶户下令：“把首级分成两堆，放在城门口，一直放到明天早上。”
